title: troximon grandiflorum var. tenuifolium
intro: Troximon grandiflorum var. tenuifolium, commonly known as tansy-leaved troximon, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are believed to possess antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting respiratory health. Troximon grandiflorum var. tenuifolium is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
